n: Barad Guldur: Gruesome Relics and Tomes

steps.t: The relics and tomes of the Necromancer can be found throughout Barad Guldur. You should keep an eye out for any useful clues or information that will…
Anglú awaits you in Barad Guldur. You should hasten back to Anglú and tell him of your findings throughout the tower.
